hooks.command: FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -o '"file_path":"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/"file_path":"//;s/"//'); case "$FILE" in *.env|*.env.*|*credentials*|*secret*|*.key|*.pem) echo 'BLOCK: Do not modify sensitive files (.env, credentials, secrets, keys)' && exit 2;; esac

FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -o '"file_path":"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/"file_path":"//;s/"//'); case "$FILE" in *pnpm-lock.yaml) echo 'BLOCK: Do not manually edit the lock file — use pnpm install' && exit 2;; esac

FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -o '"file_path":"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/"file_path":"//;s/"//'); REPO_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd); case "$FILE" in *.js|*.ts|*.vue) cd "$REPO_ROOT" && pnpm exec eslint --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true;; esac
